summary: A brief teaser for an interview with Demis Hassabis at the World Economic Forum. The text outlines the topics discussed, noting his conservative timeline for AGI, his confidence in Google's AI position, and his surprise at competitors introducing ads into AI chatbots so early.

anti_patterns.description: Introducing advertising into AI chatbots too early in their development.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: While the exact rationale isn't detailed in this summary, Hassabis expressed surprise that competitors moved to ads 'so early' and noted Google has no current plans to put them in Gemini.
